articles.title: Best players to use in FC 26 Lucky Number Seven Evolution
articles.description: The Lucky Number Seven Evolution is now live in FC 26 , and it can lead to some interesting chains. Available for free, the evolution can be used for a maximum of three times. While the upgrades are certainly useful, you'll have to meet the requirements before picking a card. Let's look at some of the best potential candidates to consider for the evolution. Table of contents FC 26 Lucky Number Seven Evolution requirements FC 26 Lucky Number Seven Evolution upgrades Best players to use in Lucky Number Seven Evolution FC 26 Lucky Number Seven Evolution requirements Here are the requirements of Lucky Number Seven Evolution in FC 26 . Overall: Max 88 Not Rarity: World Tour Silver Stars Not Position: GK FC 26 Lucky Number Seven Evolution upgrades The evolution has two levels of upgrades, each with certain conditions to fulfill. Level 1 upgrades Overall: +1 Balance: +7|90 Crossing: +7|93 Shot Power: +7|95 Vision: +7|92 Level 2 upgrades Dribbling: +7|93 Jumping: +7|92 Strength: +7|92 Level 1 upgrade requirements Play 2 matches in Squad Battles on min. Semi-Pro difficulty (or Rush/Rivals/Champions/Live Events) using your active EVO Player in game. Level 2 upgrade requirements Play 1 match in Squad Battles on min Semi-Pro difficulty (or Rush/Rivals/Champions/Live Events) using your active EVO player in game. Best players to use in Lucky Number Seven Evolution Here are some of my best recommendations for inclusion in the evolution. Cristiano Ronaldo Cornerstones (Will have to be combined with other evolutions). Carlos Espi LaLiga POTM Feller Primetime Summerville Answer the Call Mitoma World Tour Suzuki Primetime Danjuma eLaLiga Giuly Ultimate Birthday Hero Kvaratskhelia (Needs to be combined with other evolutions) Michael Olise Joga Bonito (Needs to be combined with other evolutions) While you can use this evolution as a standalone choice, it's ideally meant to be used in chains. There are several 89 and 90-rated evolutions that are currently available in Ultimate Team. Your aim is to use the upgrades on a lower-rated card, complete the two steps, and then include it in other evolutions that offer more boosts. The post Best players to use in FC 26 Lucky Number Seven Evolution appeared first on Destructoid .

articles.title: From 2018: Media mogul Ted Turner
articles.description: Ted Turner, the media entrepreneur who owned TV and sports franchises, created CNN, and skippered yachts in the America's Cup, died on May 6, 2026 at age 87. In this Sept. 30, 2018 "Sunday Morning" profile, the outspoken Turner – known for his environmental advocacy as well as his politically incorrect views – talked with senior contributor Ted Koppel about how he fulfilled more ambitions than many people could ever dream of; and how, nearing 80, he faced a decline brought about by Lewy body dementia, a progressive brain disorder.
